facebook.caption: This place fixes burnout. Chen Sea Resort & Spa sits on Bãi Xép beach in Ông Lang, away from the busy south coast crowds. Minimalist villas, an infinity pool, open-air gym, and a stretch of sand that stays quiet. 4.5 stars across 872 reviews. That's not luck, that's consistency. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the infinity pool blur into the ocean at Chen Sea Resort & Spa on Bãi Xép. Minimalist villas, quiet beach, zero chaos. 4.5 stars. 872 people agree this is the one. Tag your travel buddy.

instagram.caption: This place fixes burnout. Chen Sea Resort & Spa, Bãi Xép beach. Quiet, minimal, 4.5 stars. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
instagram.video_caption: Infinity pool melting into the sea at Chen Sea Resort & Spa. Bãi Xép keeps it quiet. 4.5 stars earned.

tiktok.caption: The resort you book when you actually need rest. Chen Sea, Bãi Xép. 4.5★ 872 reviews. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocResort #VietnamTravel #TravelTips
